scripts.final:client: npm run final:openapi && openapi-ts --file openapi-ts.config.mjs && vite build --config packages/api-client/vite.config.js
scripts.final:build: npm run final:client && vite build apps/web && vite build apps/extension
scripts.test:final: npm run final:typecheck && vite build apps/web && vite build apps/extension && node --test apps/web/src/features/dashboard/dashboardSession.test.js apps/web/src/shared/api/dashboardClient.test.js apps/extension/src/session/captureSession.test.js apps/extension/src/shared/captureClient.test.js && .venv/bin/pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.test: node --test test/parity/*.test.js src/backend/test/*.test.js src/features/jobPostings/test/*.test.js src/features/notes/test/*.test.js src/features/resumes/test/*.test.js && python3 -m unittest discover -s src/features/resumes/ml/test
